scripts.start:
bash -c 'printf "current version:
"; printf "nor-customs bot v$(node -p "require('"'"'./package.json'"'"').version")
";printf "
out.log:
"; &&  sudo systemctl start nor-customs-bot.service --no-pager'
scripts.stop:
bash -c 'printf "current version:
"; printf "nor-customs bot v$(node -p "require('"'"'./package.json'"'"').version")
";printf "
out.log:
"; && sudo systemctl stop nor-customs-bot.service'
scripts.status:
bash -c 'printf "current version:
"; printf "nor-customs bot v$(node -p "require('"'"'./package.json'"'"').version")
";printf "
out.log:
"; && systemctl status nor-customs-bot.service --no-pager
"'
